title: [BUG] table方法数字金额设置格式不生效
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

Lib version: X.Y.Z

## Steps To Reproduce

<!-- The exact steps required to reproduce the issue, ideally with a code example -->

```javascript
const wb = new ExcelJS.Workbook();
const ws = wb.addWorksheet('XYZ');

ws.getCell('A1').value = 7;
expect(ws.getCell('A1').value).to.equal(7);
```

## The expected behaviour:

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. -->


## Possible solution (optional, but very helpful):

```javascript
worksheet.columns = [
                          {width: 30},
                          {width: 30},
                          {width: 10},
                          {width: 30},
                          {width: 10},
                          {width: 30},
                          {width: 30},
                          {width: 40},
                          {width: 10},
                          {width: 20},
                          {width: 10, numFmt: '0.00%'},
                          {width: 10},
                        ];
```

comments.author: huyunan
